scripts.build-js: terser front/js/admin.js -o front/js/admin.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/caddie-details.js -o front/js/caddie-details.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/caddie-shop.js -o front/js/caddie-shop.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/functions.js -o front/js/functions.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/like.js -o front/js/like.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/login.js -o front/js/login.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/logout.js -o front/js/logout.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/menu.js -o front/js/menu.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/order.js -o front/js/order.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/product-details.js -o front/js/product-details.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/register.js -o front/js/register.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/shop.js -o front/js/shop.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/shopping-basket.js -o front/js/shopping-basket.min.js -c -m && terser front/js/user-profile.js -o front/js/user-profile.min.js -c -m
scripts.build: npm run build-css && npm run build-js
